title: stachys citrina subsp. chamaesideritis
intro: Stachys citrina subsp. chamaesideritis, also known as the Chamaesideritis or Lemon Balm Stachys, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stachys citrina subsp. chamaesideritis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating. Herbal preparations of Stachys citrina subsp. chamaesideritis can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
